task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the required title text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an ActivInspire slide (Page 1) displaying the text 'South America: Countries and Capitals'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains the South America map image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an ActivInspire slide (Page 2) displaying a map of South America.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains text labels for the six specified countries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text objects on Page 2 spelling 'Brazil', 'Argentina', 'Colombia', 'Peru', 'Chile', and 'Venezuela'.

task_completion.description: Lines or arrows connect the country labels to their locations on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 5 drawn lines or arrows connecting the country text labels to the corresponding geographical areas on the map on Page 2.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains the title and the six country names as separate text objects.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an ActivInspire slide (Page 3) with the title 'Label the Map' and the six country names ('Brazil', 'Argentina', 'Colombia', 'Peru', 'Chile', 'Venezuela') appearing as distinct, separate text objects.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ActivInspire window title displaying 'south_america_map.flipchart' or a save dialog showing the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/south_america_map.flipchart'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the ActivInspire application open and being actively used, rather than terminal commands generating the file.

integrity.description: Connecting lines are drawn using GUI tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for lines or arrows created with the shape, connector, or pen tools in ActivInspire, not typed characters like '---' or '->'.

integrity.description: Country names on Page 3 are separate text objects.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the country names on Page 3 can be moved independently (e.g., scattered placement, separate bounding boxes), rather than being typed in a single text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart saved as 'south_america_map.flipchart'. Page 1 must have the text 'South America: Countries and Capitals'. Page 2 must contain the South America map and labels for Brazil, Argentina, Colombia, Peru, Chile, and Venezuela, with at least 5 lines/arrows connecting them to the map. Page 3 must be titled 'Label the Map' and have the 6 country names as separate text objects.
